requirements.summary: Revert CashierPage to Draft Version 15 state, restoring all component dependencies, UI layout, cart logic, and transaction completion flow
acceptanceCriteria: CashierPage matches the Draft Version 15 implementation
Cart functionality, customer/vehicle info fields, and receipt dialog work as in Draft Version 15
No Draft Version 21 changes remain in CashierPage

file_operations.description: Revert CashierPage to its Draft Version 15 implementation. Restore all component imports, state management, cart operations (add/remove/update quantity), customer and vehicle input fields, transaction completion flow, and receipt dialog exactly as specified in Draft Version 15. Remove any Draft Version 21 additions or modifications. Ensure the page auto-fills customer data from work order navigation state using the urlParams utility.

requirements.summary: Revert InventoryPage to Draft Version 15 state, restoring all component dependencies, search, stock management, low-stock indicators, and Excel import/export features
acceptanceCriteria: InventoryPage matches the Draft Version 15 implementation
Add, edit, delete, search, and Excel import/export work as in Draft Version 15
No Draft Version 21 changes remain in InventoryPage

file_operations.description: Revert InventoryPage to its Draft Version 15 implementation. Restore all component imports, inventory table layout, add/edit/delete dialogs, search functionality, low-stock warning indicators, quantity adjustment controls, and Excel import/export features exactly as specified in Draft Version 15. Remove any Draft Version 21 additions or modifications. Ensure both goods and service item types are properly handled.

requirements.summary: Revert ServicePage to Draft Version 15 state, restoring all component dependencies, work order creation/completion/deletion flow, search, and cashier navigation
acceptanceCriteria: ServicePage matches the Draft Version 15 implementation
Create, complete, delete, and search work orders work as in Draft Version 15
Navigation to cashier page with pre-filled customer data works as in Draft Version 15
No Draft Version 21 changes remain in ServicePage

file_operations.description: Revert ServicePage to its Draft Version 15 implementation. Restore all component imports, work order table with status indicators, create work order dialog (with customer name, phone, vehicles, problem description, repair action, technician fields), completion dialog, delete functionality, search/filter controls, and navigation to cashier page with pre-filled customer data using the urlParams utility exactly as specified in Draft Version 15. Remove any Draft Version 21 additions or modifications.
